channel.title: Vite on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore
channel.description: Recent content in Vite on Plakar | The Open Standard for Backup and Restore

item.title: Plakar UI #12: The Build Process
item.description: How we bundle and ship the Plakar UI — Vite, code splitting, environment configs, and what happens between writing code and serving it to users.
